response.step_by_step_log: 1. Conducted an exhaustive scan of the video audio. 2. Identified game sound effects and ambient BGM (standard Minecraft audio). 3. Observed the streamer talking, occasionally humming, and commenting on gameplay. 4. Determined that no distinct, commercial vocal music track plays at any point in the video. 5. Concluded no searches were necessary.
response.global_summary: A gameplay video of a VTuber playing Minecraft. The audio consists of background game music and the streamer talking, humming, and interacting with the game. No recognizable commercial vocal music tracks were detected throughout the video.

scenes.description: The streamer starts the session, sets up their inventory, and begins harvesting crops in their Minecraft world. They occasionally hum, but there is no vocal music.
The streamer continues farming and discusses their plan to craft a diamond axe. No vocal music.
The streamer interacts with chickens in their coop and crafts items, including a pumpkin pie. They continue to talk and hum, but no vocal music plays.
